title: A quick scoping review of airborne perfluorooctanoic acid (PFOA) and other per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS)
body: "This review provides insights into the sources, transport, concentrations, dispersion, deposition and estimation of airborne perfluorooctanoic acid (PFOA) and other per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) and has identified gaps in knowledge.  Addressing these gaps will help to inform future regulatory measures and mitigation of the impacts of airborne PFAS. "
